# Expense Tracker AI - Enterprise System

> Enterprise-grade financial management system with Google Gemini AI integration and RTL support.

## Core Architectural Map

### Backend (Node.js/TypeScript)
- **Entry**: `backend/src/server.ts`
- **AI Controller**: `backend/src/controllers/ai.controller.ts` (Gemini SDK integration)
- **Recurring Logic**: `backend/src/controllers/recurring.controller.ts`
- **Models**: `backend/src/models/` (Mongoose)
- **Routes**: `backend/src/routes/`

### Frontend (React 19/TypeScript)
- **Entry**: `frontend/src/main.jsx`
- **Layout**: `frontend/src/App.jsx`
- **Localization**: `frontend/src/i18n.js` (English/Arabic RTL support)
- **State**: `frontend/src/context/`
- **Components**: `frontend/src/components/`

## Key Capabilities
- **AI Analytics**: Generative insights using Google Gemini.
- **Voice-to-Text**: Audio transcription for logs.
- **Automated Finance**: Recurring transaction management.
- **PWA**: Offline-first mobility.

## Development Checklist
- `backend/.env` requires `MONGO_URI`, `JWT_SECRET`, and `GEMINI_API_KEY`.
- `frontend/.env` requires `VITE_API_URL`.
